=====On hand=====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Hugh
|pkmn=Vibrava
|stage1=Trapinch
|type1=Ground
|type2=Dragon
|img=Hugh Trapinch Adventures.png
|img2=Hugh Vibrava Adventures.png
|epnum=PS525
|epname=The Transfer Student
|desc={{p|Vibrava}} is Hugh's first known Pokémon. As a {{p|Trapinch}}, it was used to battle [[Leo]]'s {{p|Deino}} at the Aspertia City Trainers' School. It won, but it was then defeated by [[Blake's Dewott]] afterwards. Sometime before going to Pokéstar Studios, Trapinch evolved into a Vibrava.

Vibrava's known moves are {{m|Sonic Boom}}, {{m|Dragon Breath}}, and {{m|Sandstorm}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Hugh
|pkmn=Pidove
|type1=Normal
|type2=Flying
|img=Hugh Pidove Adventures.png
|epnum=PS531
|epname=Unforgettable Memories
|desc={{p|Pidove}} is Hugh's second known Pokémon. It was given to Hugh by his grandfather, along with a {{p|Tynamo}} and a {{p|Purrloin}}. It was first used to battle a group of {{tc|Team Plasma Grunt}}s at the Aspertia Trainers' School. It used {{m|Bestow}} to give a Grunt's {{p|Klang}} a [[Choice Band]], preventing it from using any move other than {{m|Protect}}.

Pidove's only known move is {{m|Bestow}} and its Ability is {{a|Super Luck}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Hugh
|pkmn=Eelektross
|stage1=Tynamo
|stage2=Eelektrik
|type1=Electric
|img=Hugh Tynamo Adventures.png
|img2=Hugh Eelektross Adventures.png
|epnum=PS531
|epname=Unforgettable Memories
|desc={{p|Eelektross}} is Hugh's third known Pokémon. It was given to to Hugh as a {{p|Tynamo}} by his grandfather, along with a {{p|Pidove}} and a {{p|Purrloin}}. Sometime prior to ''[[PS543|Abyssal Ruins]]'', it evolved into an Eelektross. It was used to battle a group of {{tc|Team Plasma Grunt}}s that came to attack [[Rood]].

Eelektross's only known move is {{m|Crush Claw}} and its Ability is {{a|Levitate}}.}}
